test-case.name: Accelerator YAML parser is safe-by-design.Parses simple key:value
Accelerator YAML parser is safe-by-design.Parses inline list values

test-case.description: Does NOT attempt to load powershell-yaml at runtime
test-case.name: Accelerator YAML parser is safe-by-design.Does NOT attempt to load powershell-yaml at runtime

test-case.description: Treats YAML type tags as literal text (no object instantiation)
test-case.name: Accelerator YAML parser is safe-by-design.Treats YAML type tags as literal text (no object instantiation)

test-case.description: Invoke-MsixAutoFix exposes the -AddAliases switch and -AliasAppIds parameter
test-case.name: AppExecutionAlias autofix stage.Invoke-MsixAutoFix exposes the -AddAliases switch and -AliasAppIds parameter

test-case.description: Invoke-MsixAutoFix -DryRun lists the AddAliases stage when -AddAliases is set
test-case.name: AppExecutionAlias autofix stage.Invoke-MsixAutoFix -DryRun lists the AddAliases stage when -AddAliases is set

test-case.description: Invoke-MsixAutoFix -DryRun lists AddAliases when only -AliasAppIds is supplied
test-case.name: AppExecutionAlias autofix stage.Invoke-MsixAutoFix -DryRun lists AddAliases when only -AliasAppIds is supplied

test-case.description: Invoke-MsixAutoFix -DryRun omits the stage when neither switch is set
test-case.name: AppExecutionAlias autofix stage.Invoke-MsixAutoFix -DryRun omits the stage when neither switch is set

test-case.description: Invoke-MsixAutoFixFromAnalysis adds AddAliases stage for AppExecutionAlias findings
test-case.name: AppExecutionAlias autofix stage.Invoke-MsixAutoFixFromAnalysis adds AddAliases stage for AppExecutionAlias findings

test-case.description: Invoke-MsixAutoFixFromAnalysis skips AddAliases when no AppExecutionAlias findings exist
test-case.name: AppExecutionAlias autofix stage.Invoke-MsixAutoFixFromAnalysis skips AddAliases when no AppExecutionAlias findings exist
AppExecutionAlias autofix stage.Invoke-MsixAutoFixFromAnalysis deduplicates AppIds across findings

test-case.description: Get-MsixIsolationCapability returns a list with promptForAccess
test-case.name: Win32 App Isolation.Get-MsixIsolationCapability returns a list with promptForAccess
Win32 App Isolation.All capabilities follow isolatedWin32- naming

test-case.description: Selects only .exe and .dll files, ignoring side-by-side .manifest files
test-case.name: Authenticode folder filter.Selects only .exe and .dll files, ignoring side-by-side .manifest files
Authenticode folder filter.Source: _MsixVerifyAuthenticodeFolder uses .Extension -in (not -Include glob)
Install-MsixMgr Authenticode opt-out.Install-MsixMgr exposes a -VerifyAuthenticode switch (default off)
Install-MsixMgr Authenticode opt-out.Update-MsixMgr forwards -VerifyAuthenticode

test-case.description: Source: Install-MsixMgr only verifies when -VerifyAuthenticode is supplied
test-case.name: Install-MsixMgr Authenticode opt-out.Source: Install-MsixMgr only verifies when -VerifyAuthenticode is supplied

test-case.description: Source: every NON-msixmgr toolchain downloader still verifies unconditionally
test-case.name: Install-MsixMgr Authenticode opt-out.Source: every NON-msixmgr toolchain downloader still verifies unconditionally
PSF builders.New-MsixPsfFileRedirectionConfig.Returns FileRedirectionFixup.dll
PSF builders.New-MsixPsfFileRedirectionConfig.Defaults to packageRelative
PSF builders.New-MsixPsfFileRedirectionConfig.Honours -PathType

test-case.description: Wraps single Patterns into an array
test-case.name: PSF builders.New-MsixPsfFileRedirectionConfig.Wraps single Patterns into an array
PSF builders.New-MsixPsfRegLegacyConfig.Sets type=ModifyKeyAccess
PSF builders.New-MsixPsfRegLegacyConfig.Validates Hive enum
PSF builders.New-MsixPsfRegLegacyConfig.Validates Access enum
PSF builders.New-MsixPsfEnvVarConfig.Returns EnvVarFixup.dll with envVars hashtable
PSF builders.New-MsixPsfTraceConfig.Has filesystem + registry levels
PSF builders.New-MsixPsfArgument.Returns app id and arguments
PSF builders.New-MsixPsfArgument.Omits empty fields
PSF builders.New-MsixPsfStartScriptConfig.Builds startScript by default
PSF builders.New-MsixPsfStartScriptConfig.Switches to endScript when -EndScript

test-case.description: Add-MsixLegacyContextMenu emits com:Extension at Application level (bare com)
test-case.name: Shell-extension context menu placement (TMEditX-verified pattern).Add-MsixLegacyContextMenu emits com:Extension at Application level (bare com)

test-case.description: ContextMenu.ps1 source uses bare com: for the SurrogateServer block
test-case.name: Shell-extension context menu placement (TMEditX-verified pattern).ContextMenu.ps1 source uses bare com: for the SurrogateServer block
Shell-extension context menu placement (TMEditX-verified pattern).ContextMenu.ps1 emits desktop4:Extension + desktop5:ItemType/Verb (NOT desktop9)

test-case.description: CLSID is lowercased in both Add-MsixLegacyContextMenu and Add-MsixFileExplorerContextMenu
test-case.name: Shell-extension context menu placement (TMEditX-verified pattern).CLSID is lowercased in both Add-MsixLegacyContextMenu and Add-MsixFileExplorerContextMenu

test-case.description: Add-MsixComServerExtension (InProcessServer only) still uses com4 at Package level
test-case.name: Shell-extension context menu placement (TMEditX-verified pattern).Add-MsixComServerExtension (InProcessServer only) still uses com4 at Package level

test-case.description: Returns empty array for a package with no Applications
test-case.name: Empty / minimal manifests.Returns empty array for a package with no Applications
Empty / minimal manifests.Handles 10 Applications without truncation
Empty / minimal manifests.Preserves Unicode in DisplayName round-trip
Get-MsixManifestApplication parameter sets.-All returns all apps
Get-MsixManifestApplication parameter sets.-AppId returns the matching one
Get-MsixManifestApplication parameter sets.Default (no -All, no -AppId) returns first app
Deprecated plural still works.Get-MsixManifestApplications returns the same as -All

test-suite.name: Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.Get-MsixFindingConfidence (probabilistic OR math)
test-suite.description: Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.Get-MsixFindingConfidence (probabilistic OR math)

test-case.description: Returns 0.0 when there are no evidence items
test-case.name: Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.Get-MsixFindingConfidence (probabilistic OR math).Returns 0.0 when there are no evidence items

test-case.description: A single weight=0.9 evidence item yields confidence 0.9
test-case.name: Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.Get-MsixFindingConfidence (probabilistic OR math).A single weight=0.9 evidence item yields confidence 0.9
Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.Get-MsixFindingConfidence (probabilistic OR math).Three weight=0.5 items yield 1 - 0.5^3 = 0.875

test-case.description: Saturates at 1.0 when one evidence item is weight=1.0
test-case.name: Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.Get-MsixFindingConfidence (probabilistic OR math).Saturates at 1.0 when one evidence item is weight=1.0
Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.Get-MsixFindingConfidence (probabilistic OR math).Clamps out-of-range weights to [0, 1]

test-suite.name: Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.New-MsixFinding produces the canonical shape
test-suite.description: Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.New-MsixFinding produces the canonical shape

test-case.description: Carries every legacy field plus Confidence + EvidenceItems
test-case.name: Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.New-MsixFinding produces the canonical shape.Carries every legacy field plus Confidence + EvidenceItems

test-case.description: Add-MsixEvidence stores per-source properties (Path, Result, ...) verbatim
test-case.name: Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.New-MsixFinding produces the canonical shape.Add-MsixEvidence stores per-source properties (Path, Result, ...) verbatim

test-suite.name: Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.ConvertTo-MsixFinding (legacy -> evidence)
test-suite.description: Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.ConvertTo-MsixFinding (legacy -> evidence)

test-case.description: Wraps a legacy finding with a synthetic evidence item
test-case.name: Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.ConvertTo-MsixFinding (legacy -> evidence).Wraps a legacy finding with a synthetic evidence item

test-case.description: Maps Severity -> default weight (Error=0.95, Warning=0.7, Info=0.4)
test-case.name: Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.ConvertTo-MsixFinding (legacy -> evidence).Maps Severity -> default weight (Error=0.95, Warning=0.7, Info=0.4)

test-case.description: Is idempotent — a pre-promoted finding is returned unchanged
test-case.name: Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.ConvertTo-MsixFinding (legacy -> evidence).Is idempotent — a pre-promoted finding is returned unchanged

test-case.description: Collapses two same-Category+AppId findings into one with combined evidence
test-case.name: Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.Merge-MsixFinding.Collapses two same-Category+AppId findings into one with combined evidence

test-case.description: Keeps findings of different Categories separate
test-case.name: Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.Merge-MsixFinding.Keeps findings of different Categories separate

test-case.description: Keeps findings with different AppIds separate
test-case.name: Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.Merge-MsixFinding.Keeps findings with different AppIds separate

test-case.description: Promotes legacy findings on the fly
test-case.name: Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.Merge-MsixFinding.Promotes legacy findings on the fly

test-suite.name: Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.ConvertTo-MsixLegacyFinding round-trip
test-suite.description: Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.ConvertTo-MsixLegacyFinding round-trip

test-case.description: Drops Confidence + EvidenceItems and keeps everything else
test-case.name: Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.ConvertTo-MsixLegacyFinding round-trip.Drops Confidence + EvidenceItems and keeps everything else
Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.Invoke-MsixAutoFixFromAnalysis -MinConfidence.Exposes the -MinConfidence parameter with default 0.85

test-case.description: Skips an autofix stage when its finding falls below MinConfidence
test-case.name: Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.Invoke-MsixAutoFixFromAnalysis -MinConfidence.Skips an autofix stage when its finding falls below MinConfidence

test-case.description: Pre-evidence (legacy) findings are NOT gated out
test-case.name: Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.Invoke-MsixAutoFixFromAnalysis -MinConfidence.Pre-evidence (legacy) findings are NOT gated out

test-suite.name: Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.SARIF integration
test-suite.description: Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.SARIF integration

test-case.name: Unified evidence model + confidence scoring.SARIF integration.Surfaces evidence + confidence in result.properties

Heuristic catalogues (v0.9).Get-MsixKnownCapability.Tags rescap entries correctly

test-case.description: Returns DryRun=true and lists planned stages without mutating

Idempotent namespace additions.Add-MsixManifestNamespace twice = once

test-case.description: IgnorableNamespaces does not gain duplicate entries
test-case.name: Idempotent namespace additions.IgnorableNamespaces does not gain duplicate entries

test-case.description: Two bumps to the same build = one update
test-case.name: Idempotent MaxVersionTested bump.Two bumps to the same build = one update

test-case.description: Lower bump leaves higher value alone
test-case.name: Idempotent MaxVersionTested bump.Lower bump leaves higher value alone

test-case.description: Set-MsixManifestPublisher applied twice yields one value
test-case.name: Idempotent pure-transform mutators.Set-MsixManifestPublisher applied twice yields one value
Parameter validation rejects malformed input.Add-MsixLegacyContextMenu -Clsid.Accepts a well-formed CLSID
Parameter validation rejects malformed input.Add-MsixLegacyContextMenu -Clsid.Rejects a non-GUID

Parameter validation rejects malformed input.Update-MsixPackageVersion -NewVersion.Has a 4-part dotted-decimal ValidatePattern

Set-MsixManifestPublisher (pure transform).Updates Identity.Publisher

test-case.description: Does not touch Name or Version
test-case.name: Set-MsixManifestPublisher (pure transform).Does not touch Name or Version
Set-MsixManifestPublisher (pure transform).Returns the same XmlDocument (pipeline friendly)
Set-MsixManifestIdentity (pure transform).Updates only the supplied attributes
Set-MsixManifestIdentity (pure transform).Updates Name + Publisher + Version together
Set-MsixManifestIdentity (pure transform).Rejects 3-part version

test-case.description: Emits a friendlyno-issue message when Findings is empty
test-case.name: Get-MsixDebugRecommendation.Emits a friendlyno-issue message when Findings is empty

test-case.description: Renders an Add-MsixPsfV2 line for FileRedirectionFixup findings
test-case.name: Get-MsixDebugRecommendation.Renders an Add-MsixPsfV2 line for FileRedirectionFixup findings
Get-MsixDebugRecommendation.Renders -WorkingDirectory for WorkingDirectory findings

test-case.description: Substitutes -Pfx but emits a SecureString placeholder for -PfxPassword

Get-MsixDebugRecommendation.numbers each recommendation
RegLegacyFixups types (v0.9).ModifyKeyAccess requires -Access
RegLegacyFixups types (v0.9).ModifyKeyAccess includes access in remediation
RegLegacyFixups types (v0.9).FakeDelete omits access field
RegLegacyFixups types (v0.9).DeletionMarker passes through
RegLegacyFixups types (v0.9).Hklm2Hkcu passes through
RegLegacyFixups types (v0.9).Validates Type enum
SARIF export.ConvertTo-MsixSarif shape.Produces a SARIF 2.1.0 document

test-case.description: Has exactly one run with a driver named MSIX.PowerShell by default
test-case.name: SARIF export.ConvertTo-MsixSarif shape.Has exactly one run with a driver named MSIX.PowerShell by default

test-case.description: Produces one rule per distinct Category in the findings
test-case.name: SARIF export.ConvertTo-MsixSarif shape.Produces one rule per distinct Category in the findings
SARIF export.ConvertTo-MsixSarif shape.Produces one result per finding

test-case.description: Maps Severity to SARIF level correctly
test-case.name: SARIF export.ConvertTo-MsixSarif shape.Maps Severity to SARIF level correctly

test-case.description: Records the package path as the SARIF analysisTarget
test-case.name: SARIF export.ConvertTo-MsixSarif shape.Records the package path as the SARIF analysisTarget
SARIF export.ConvertTo-MsixSarif shape.Carries AppId + Evidence in logicalLocations

test-case.description: Keeps the original Recommendation in result.properties

test-case.description: Serialises to valid JSON via ConvertTo-Json
test-case.name: SARIF export.ConvertTo-MsixSarif shape.Serialises to valid JSON via ConvertTo-Json

test-case.description: Handles an empty findings array without crashing
test-case.name: SARIF export.ConvertTo-MsixSarif shape.Handles an empty findings array without crashing
SARIF export.Get-MsixStaticAnalysis -Sarif.Exposes the -Sarif switch
SARIF export.Get-MsixStaticAnalysis -Sarif.Source-level guard: -Sarif routes through ConvertTo-MsixSarif
Standard scripts.Get-MsixStandardScript lists all five templates

Standard scripts.New-MsixStandardScript renders CreateShortcut substituting parameters

test-case.description: Throws when a required parameter is missing
test-case.name: Standard scripts.Throws when a required parameter is missing
Standard scripts.Validates Name against the catalogue
Standard scripts.Applies defaults for optional parameters

test-case.description: Get-MsixDebugRecommendation does not interpolate the literal PFX password

test-case.description: Get-MsixDebugRecommendation emits a SecureString prompt placeholder instead of the literal password

test-case.description: Throws on HKLM entries with a clear message

Set-MsixRegistryWriteVirtualization -ExcludedKeys (selective passthrough).Deduplicates case-insensitively
Set-MsixRegistryWriteVirtualization -ExcludedKeys (selective passthrough).Places under (not )

test-case.description: Is idempotent: running the mutation twice does not duplicate ExcludedKey children
test-case.name: Set-MsixRegistryWriteVirtualization -ExcludedKeys (selective passthrough).Is idempotent: running the mutation twice does not duplicate ExcludedKey children

test-case.description: Uses ImportNode (deep clone) for foreign-namespace extension nodes
test-case.name: Import-MsixSparseShellExtension.Source-level guards.Uses ImportNode (deep clone) for foreign-namespace extension nodes
Import-MsixSparseShellExtension.Source-level guards.Rewrites com:Class @Path attributes
Import-MsixSparseShellExtension.Source-level guards.Deletes the inner .msix by default (unless -KeepInnerPackage)
Import-MsixSparseShellExtension.Source-level guards.Reads manifests via Get-MsixManifest (XML-safe loader)
Import-MsixSparseShellExtension.Source-level guards.Uses atomic scratch-sign-move repack pattern

test-case.description: Bumps MaxVersionTested to at least 17763 for desktop4 context menus
test-case.name: Import-MsixSparseShellExtension.Source-level guards.Bumps MaxVersionTested to at least 17763 for desktop4 context menus
Import-MsixSparseShellExtension.Is exported from the module
Import-MsixSparseShellExtension.Exposes the documented parameters
Import-MsixSparseShellExtension.Supports ShouldProcess (SupportsShouldProcess)

test-case.description: Omits the stage when -IgnoreNestedPackages is supplied
